input_text: A white elephant was nice. Mary decided to leave. Daniel went back to the bathroom. Eve failed to finish the report. Frogs are small animals. Mike is a bird. Most bears are big. The guide offered the tourists tea. Tallinn is in Estonia. The teacher showed the students the map. A kitchen door was open. The window was broken. Sandra travelled to the hallway. Wolves are afraid of mice. The book was read by Sara. The length of Emajogi is 80 kilometers. Mark is not in the box. The letter was written. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. Winona is a cat. If X1 is a father of Y1, Y1 is a child of X1. "Riga is not in America. A village road was narrow. Agatha is in trouble. Americans cannot disappear. Sue is a true patriot. The horse kept in the stable was calm. A chocolate cake fell. The city was destroyed. The dog chased by the boy escaped. Dole was defeated by Clinton. Nile is 10 meters long. John is a tall man and not a tall man?
